chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so guys today is our day 76

chunks.text: and in day 76 i am going to give you an exercise

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: in which you have to manipulate pdf files

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and you have to do this by using pypdf module

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so we have a module named pypdf

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: with the help of which you can merge pdf files

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so let's say i gave you 5-6 pdf files

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: you can merge them in one

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and if you want you can add some other functionality to it

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: but here you have to make the merging functionality

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so what you have to do is

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: let's say you have 7 pdf files

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so how to merge those 7 pdf files in one pdf

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: you have to write this program

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: now you will ask in which order you have to merge

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so let's do one thing

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: we will maintain the alphabetic sorting

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and according to that you can do the sorting

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: but if you want to take a particular type of pdf file

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: then you can take that too

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: but for now we will keep this question simple

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: i want you to explore pypdf

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: which is a very amazing open source

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: pure python pdf library

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: you can do splitting, merging, cropping and encrypting pdf files

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: i have used it a lot and i have given projects to many clients

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: i have earned a lot of money from this library

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: because when someone has to make a piece of software

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and they are only interested in their work

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: like i had a client

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: he made a pdf file

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: it was a big thing for him to merge 3 pdf files

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and it happens that if this module is not there

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and we write 3-4 lines of code in python

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: then things become easy for us

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: but for that person this is a big thing

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: i make a bat file which invokes my python file

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: i install python in the client's computer

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: or i make an api for it

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and i host that api on a server

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and i tell it that you have to keep this server up

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: or if you don't want to keep that server up

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: then i install python in their computer

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and make an automated script for it

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: or there is a thing called portable python

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: which becomes a whole exe of python

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: but for now you have to solve this exercise

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and whoever solves it i will give him a shoutout

chunks.text: so guys i am making this video from rapnet's mobile app

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and i am actually traveling

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and the schedule is very busy

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: but i don't want to miss 100 days of code

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so i am making this video from rapnet's mobile app

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so guys do explore pypdf

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: there are things written in its documentation

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: if you go in its documentation then you will learn a lot of things

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: i am opening the read the docs of pypdf in my phone

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: and you can see here

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: that pypdf2 is a free and open source library

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: there are many examples in it

chunks.title: Exercise 8 - Merge the PDF
chunks.text: so at least merging is a very simple thing
